svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Seite-1" id="3cjrd2ugNf0TFMgQk3xr"> <mxGraphModel dx="778" dy="524" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-146" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Daten und Ablage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="227" x="1911" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-147" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="394" width="305" x="1366" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-148" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="172" width="310" x="838" y="256" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-149" parent="1" style="ellipse;aspect=fixed;strokeWidth=2;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Nutzer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="63" width="63" x="620" y="311" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-150" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Angular Web-App
(UI, Dashboards, OCR-Key Input)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="260" x="863" y="291" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-151" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="NestJS Backend API
(Core Logik und Sicherheit)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="255" x="1391" y="303" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-152" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;strokeWidth=2;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="PostgreSQL DB
(Nutzer, Belege & entsprechende Zuweisungen)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="158" x="1945" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-153" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;strokeWidth=2;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Lokales Dateisystem
(Kassenbons)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="160" x="1944" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-154" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#333333;" value="Chatbot API
(aktuell Gemma 4)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="177" x="1936" y="465" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-155" edge="1" parent="1" source="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-149" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;" target="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-150" value="Nutzt App und
lädt Bons hoch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-156" edge="1" parent="1" source="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-150" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.51;rounded=0;" target="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-151" value="HTTPS REST Request
(inkl. JWT und API-Key)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-157" edge="1" parent="1" source="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-151" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.65;exitY=0.01;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;" target="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-152" value="Liest / Schreibt Nutzerdaten mit Kassenbelegen"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.3046" y="8" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1590" y="188" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-158" edge="1" parent="1" source="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-151" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.51;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;" target="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-153" value="Speichert Kassenbonbilder"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-159" edge="1" parent="1" source="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-151" style="curved=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.64;exitY=1.01;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;" target="kCXjJZdas9S4NlHRmuFh-154" value="Reicht Bild und Systempromt weiter"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1671" y="504" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
